missing_info.topic: Age-gating obligations for child-directed product integration
missing_info.context_anchor: Customer will integrate the API into a child-directed education product and needs age-gating obligations reviewed.

distractors.span: This Agreement is governed by the laws of the State of Delaware, without regard to conflict-of-law rules.
distractors.why_benign: The governing-law canary says Delaware law is acceptable for this engagement.

distractors.span: Vendor will provide 99.9% monthly uptime for the production API and will use commercially reasonable efforts to maintain median API latency below 900 milliseconds for ordinary text requests.
distractors.why_benign: The uptime canary says a 99.9% uptime SLA with credits is acceptable for this engagement.
